item.endrem.nether_eye.description: §7§oPulled from the ashes of Ignis, still burning with the arena's fury
item.endrem.exotic_eye.description: §7§oRecovered from the Leviathan, carrying the pressure of a drowned kingdom
item.endrem.old_eye.description: §7§oTorn from the Netherite Monstrosity, an ancient gaze sealed in blacksteel
item.endrem.lost_eye.description: §7§oSalvaged from the Harbinger, a machine that forgot where its war began
item.endrem.rogue_eye.description: §7§oClaimed from Maledictus, cursed by a knight who would not stay buried
item.endrem.cold_eye.description: §7§oTaken from Scylla, cold as the storm that crowns the Acropolis
item.endrem.evil_eye.description: §7§oUnearthed from the Ancient Remnant, carrying the malice of a dead empire
